section.heading: Fellowship program of Advisory Committee on Reactor Safeguards; selection of fellowships

content.p: To assist the Advisory Committee on Reactor Safeguards in carrying out its function, the committee shall establish a fellowship program under which persons having appropriate engineering or scientific expertise are assigned particular tasks relating to the functions of the committee. Such fellowship shall be for 2-year periods and the recipients of such fellowships shall be selected pursuant to such criteria as may be established by the committee.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was not enacted as part of the Atomic Energy Act of 1954.
